title: Garden Fresh Canadian Blueberries Bowl
description: A refreshing weeknight dish featuring the sweetness of Canadian blueberries, the savory flavor of soffritto, and the crunch of fresh herbs. Perfect for a quick and easy dessert or snack.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the soffritto, parsley, and mint until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together the blueberries, honey, lemon juice, and salt until the blueberries are evenly coated.
Add the soffritto mixture to the blueberry mixture and stir until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into a wooden bowl and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional parsley and mint if desired.
Cover and refrigerate for up to 2 hours before serving.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional fruits or herbs if desired.
Leftovers can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
To make ahead, prepare the soffritto mixture and blueberry mixture separately, then combine just before serving.
